params.reason: candles of heading 34.06 are excluded from the current section/chapter
fireworks or other pyrotechnic articles of heading 36.04 are excluded
Yarns, monofilament, cords or gut or the like for fishing, cut to length but not made up as fishing lines, from Chapter 39, heading 42.06 or Section XI are excluded
sports bags or other containers of headings 42.02, 43.03 or 43.04 are excluded
sports clothing or fancy dress of textiles from Chapter 61 or 62 are excluded
textile flags, bunting, or sails for boats, sailboards or land craft classified in Chapter 63 are excluded
sports footwear (other than skating boots with ice or roller skates attached) of Chapter 64, or sports headgear of Chapter 65 are excluded
walking-sticks, whips, riding-crops and parts thereof classified in headings 66.02 and 66.03 are excluded
unmounted glass eyes for dolls or other toys of heading 70.18 are excluded
Parts of general use as defined in Note 2 to Section XV, of base metal (Section XV), or similar goods of plastics (Chapter 39) are excluded
bells, gongs or the like of heading 83.06 are excluded
Specific items are excluded from the current heading/chapter: pumps for liquids, filtering/purifying machinery, electric motors, transformers, storage media, remote control apparatus
sports vehicles of Section XVII are excluded, except bobsleighs, toboggans and the like which fall under heading 9506
Articles identifiable as intended exclusively for animals (e.g., pet toys) are excluded from heading 95.03 and classified in their own appropriate headings
Video game consoles or machines operated by coins, banknotes, bank cards, tokens or by any other means of payment are excluded from this subheading and classified in 9504.30

params.covers: articles in which natural or cultured pearls, precious or semi-precious stones (natural, synthetic or reconstructed), precious metal or metal clad with precious metal constitute only minor constituents
articles combined with one or more items that cannot be considered as sets, where combinations are put up together for retail sale and have the essential character of toys
video game consoles with external display output

params.condition: suitable for use solely or principally with articles of this Chapter
